title: 050_elegant-tab-nexus
description: This is a dark-themed tab navigation featuring a striking vibrant pink gradient for active states. It employs subtle animations, lift effects, and glow for a modern, interactive user experience.

title: 031_radio-button-variant-2
description: This design features a soft, three-dimensional neumorphic style for radio selectors, characterized by glowing 'orb' indicators and subtle interactive transitions. It creates a modern, tactile, and visually engaging user input experience.

title: 019_premium-accordion-component
description: This accordion component features a clean, modern aesthetic with a focus on subtle interactions. It utilizes soft green gradients, elegant shadows, and smooth transitions to provide a premium and engaging user experience.

title: 020_premium-tag-chips
description: This design features interactive, pill-shaped tag chips with a clean, modern aesthetic. It employs subtle gradients and shadows for depth, and provides clear visual feedback on hover for an enhanced user experience.

title: 034_aurabox-checkbox-toggle
description: This design features a highly interactive, skeuomorphic toggle button with deep shadows, glossy reflections, and a pulsing glow effect upon activation, providing rich visual feedback. Its dark-themed background and vibrant primary color give it a modern, tech-inspired aesthetic.
